Header file for retrieving metadata of the activity tracker settings module.

# Purpose
This header file declares a function `settings_activity_tracker_get_info` that returns a pointer to a `SettingsModuleMetadata` object. The function is likely used to retrieve metadata information related to a settings activity tracker module. The inclusion of `settings_menu.h` suggests that the function interacts with or depends on components defined in that header file. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions. This code provides narrow functionality, focusing on a specific aspect of a settings module within a larger system.
